name: The Clubhouse Lounge
about: The Clubhouse Lounge is an indoor golf and sports bar located at 1105 Hwy 2 W in Kalispell, MT. It features four top-of-the-line Trackman golf simulators and multiple large-screen TVs, providing a complete indoor golf experience. The venue serves beer, wine, and a full kitchen with Montana-raised beef from Lower Valley Meats in its burgers, alongside craft beer and American wines. Open 7 days a week, it operates Monday-Thursday from 11am to 10pm and Friday-Sunday from 10am to 11pm, making it a flexible destination for both golf and social events.
why_golfers_like_it: 4 top-of-the-line Trackman simulators for accurate and immersive gameplay
Full kitchen and bar service available while playing golf
Multiple big-screen TVs for watching sports events or socializing
Hosts leagues and events, creating a community atmosphere
Flexible hours allow for both daytime and evening play

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen with Montana-raised beef burgers, craft beer, American wines, and various non-alcoholic options
Craft beer, American wines, and full bar service

simulator_hardware.notes: Top-of-the-line Trackman simulators with full metrics capture

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue does not explicitly mention club rentals, so it is recommended to bring your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drink?
faq.answer: The venue has a full kitchen and bar service, but BYOB (bring your own alcohol) is not mentioned.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The venue does not specify the duration for 18 holes, but typical simulator rounds take 1-2 hours depending on the number of players.

faq.question: Is this place kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is kid-friendly, offering family-friendly games and events, and welcomes children during operating hours.
